purpose: Launch day prelaunch videos for Girl Gone AI

videos.name: Launch Announcement
videos.script: Girl Gone AI is officially live! I'm Jaci, and I built a collection of digital tools to help you crush your goals — planners, templates, business kits, all ready to download right now. Link in bio!

videos.name: Med Spa Blueprint
videos.script: Dreaming of opening your own med spa? I created the complete launch blueprint — timeline, pricing, licensing, everything. Twenty-four dollars. Girl Gone AI dot com.

videos.name: ADHD Planner
videos.script: Your brain has fifty tabs open? Same. That's why I built the ADHD focus planner. Brain dumps, focus blocks, dopamine wins. Fourteen dollars, link in bio.

videos.name: Wedding Dashboard
videos.script: Planning a wedding without losing your mind? The Wedding Planning Dashboard keeps every detail organized. Eighteen dollars at Girl Gone AI.

videos.name: Call To Action
videos.script: We just launched thirteen digital products — planners, templates, business tools. Everything under twenty-five dollars. Check out Girl Gone AI before they sell out!
videos.post_time: Evening push / end of launch day
